productDisplayName: Ed Hardy Men Eagle Print Blue Tshirts
description: Composition Blue T-shirt made of 100% cotton pique, has a ribbed contrast polo neck with a buttoned chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed contrast hems, tattoo art printed on the left chest, and brand name printed on the right sleeve and at the back Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry on low Do not iron on embellishments Inspired by the messenger of the highest gods - the eagle - this ed hardy t-shirt sporting the eagle tattoo on the left chest and back is a masterpiece of its own. Discover your creative side once more with this t-shirt and stick to the cool group that ed hardy represents. Pair this tee with denims and suede brogues for a stylish look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
